originalTitle: America is losing the AI productivity war to 3.5 million Chinese STEM graduates
summary: Big Tech’s structural mistakes are costing stock investors and fueling a massive talent crisis.
content: Big Tech’s structural mistakes are costing stock investors and fueling a massive talent crisis.
chineseTitle: 美国正在输给 350 万中国 STEM 毕业生
chineseSummary: 大型科技公司的结构性错误正在让股票投资者付出代价，并引发大规模的人才危机。

whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
